title: Remove obsolete document page to restore full builds
summary: Records release evidence for removing the obsolete Pages Router _document file from the dashboard so Next.js no longer fails production builds with a missing /_document module during mixed app-router generation, restoring full build and public-route smoke validation.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the full production build and long public marketing route smoke both complete successfully after removing the obsolete Pages Router document file.

ops.rollback_plan: Restore pages/_document.tsx if a Pages Router document customization is reintroduced later, but only alongside the necessary Pages Router wiring so Next.js continues emitting the special page during production builds.
